title: colutea buhsei
intro: Colutea buhsei, also known as the bladder senna, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Colutea buhsei include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems, among others. Colutea buhsei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
